notes: This release includes: (1) Command namespace migration - Claude Code uses subdirectory (.claude/commands/superwork/), Cursor uses filename prefix (.cursor/commands/superwork-*); (2) Bug fix for incorrect task directory paths in agent docs - these files will be updated via normal template sync
